attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ (00242) is PROVISIONAL — maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-RHEUM-03 bucket.
Age (~45) and sex (male) INFERRED — not stated in the source note; please confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied (§6): the source is a physically-present after-hours home visit with a clinician neurological examination and IM ketorolac 30 mg administration. The AI Doctor can do neither — the neuro exam findings are sealed in 10/11 (cannot_be_elicited_via_telehealth) and parenteral analgesia is reprojected to arranging prompt in-person review.

Presentation layer de-anchored: written as the patient would present a severe flare BEFORE a disposition is known; the known psoriatic arthritis is retained as legitimate patient-reported PMH, but the flare-vs-mimic reasoning, correct tier and management remain sealed.

Over-triage-resistance calibration: correct_baseline_tier T2 with minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2 — an alarming presentation of a known chronic inflammatory flare with a NEGATIVE cauda-equina red-flag screen; over-triage to T4/T5 is the scored defect, with mandatory T5/000 cauda-equina safety-netting retained.

Source management reprojected to evidence base: the note's pseudo-physiology ('dilate inflamed blood vessels'), medicinal cannabinoids and omega-3 suggestions, and implicit NSAID stacking were encoded as evidence-graded/behaviour-change items and errors of commission rather than reproduced as recommendations.

Candidate SNOMED CT / ICD-10-AM codes (including differential-diagnosis codes) and the omitted meloxicam AMT code are best-effort and UNVERIFIED — meloxicam AMT code omitted rather than guessed (§8); all registered codes await terminology-server receipts.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
